violation.reason: Opening brace should be on a separate line
violation.ruleDescription: The correct positioning of braces that introduce a block of code or member list is highly controversial. No matter which style is preferred, consistency is key. Apart from different tastes, the positioning of braces can also have a significant impact on the readability of the code, especially for visually impaired developers. This rule ensures that braces are on a separate line after the declaration to contrast the code block from the rest of the declaration. Comments between the declaration and the opening brace are respected. Check out the `opening_brace` rule for a different style.

Apart from different tastes, the positioning of braces can also have a significant impact on the readability of the code, especially for visually impaired developers. This rule ensures that braces are on a separate line after the declaration to contrast the code block from the rest of the declaration. Comments between the declaration and the opening brace are respected. Check out the `opening_brace` rule for a different style.

violation.ruleDescription: The correct positioning of braces that introduce a block of code or member list is highly controversial. No matter which style is preferred, consistency is key. Apart from different tastes, the positioning of braces can also have a significant impact on the readability of the code, especially for visually impaired developers. This rule ensures that braces are on a separate line after the declaration to contrast the code block from the rest of the declaration. Comments between the declaration and the opening brace are respected. Check out the `opening_brace` rule for a different style.

Apart from different tastes, the positioning of braces can also have a significant impact on the readability of the code, especially for visually impaired developers. This rule ensures that braces are on a separate line after the declaration to contrast the code block from the rest of the declaration. violation.reason: Opening brace should be on a separate line
violation.ruleDescription: The correct positioning of braces that introduce a block of code or member list is highly controversial. No matter which style is preferred, consistency is key. Apart from different tastes, the positioning of braces can also have a significant impact on the readability of the code, especially for visually impaired developers. This rule ensures that braces are on a separate line after the declaration to contrast the code block from the rest of the declaration. Comments between the declaration and the opening brace are respected. Check out the `opening_brace` rule for a different style.

violation.ruleDescription: The correct positioning of braces that introduce a block of code or member list is highly controversial. No matter which style is preferred, consistency is key. Apart from different tastes, the positioning of braces can also have a significant impact on the readability of the code, especially for visually impaired developers. This rule ensures that braces are on a separate line after the declaration to contrast the code block from the rest of the declaration. Comments between the declaration and the opening brace are respected. Check out the `opening_brace` rule for a different style.

Opening brace should be on a separate line
violation.ruleDescription: The correct positioning of braces that introduce a block of code or member list is highly controversial. No matter which style is preferred, consistency is key. Apart from different tastes, the positioning of braces can also have a significant impact on the readability of the code, especially for visually impaired developers. This rule ensures that braces are on a separate line after the declaration to contrast the code block from the rest of the declaration. Comments between the declaration and the opening brace are respected. Check out the `opening_brace` rule for a different style.

This rule ensures that braces are on a separate line after the declaration to contrast the code block from the rest of the declaration. Comments between the declaration and the opening brace are respected. Check out the `opening_brace` rule for a different style.

Apart from different tastes, the positioning of braces can also have a significant impact on the readability of the code, especially for visually impaired developers. Comments between the declaration and the opening brace are respected. Check out the `opening_brace` rule for a different style.

This rule ensures that braces are on a separate line after the declaration to contrast the code block from the rest of the declaration. Comments between the declaration and the opening brace are respected. Check out the `opening_brace` rule for a different style.

Apart from different tastes, the positioning of braces can also have a significant impact on the readability of the code, especially for visually impaired developers. This rule ensures that braces are on a separate line after the declaration to contrast the code block from the rest of the declaration. Comments between the declaration and the opening brace are respected. Check out the `opening_brace` rule for a different style.

Opening brace should be on a separate line
violation.ruleDescription: The correct positioning of braces that introduce a block of code or member list is highly controversial. No matter which style is preferred, consistency is key. Apart from different tastes, the positioning of braces can also have a significant impact on the readability of the code, especially for visually impaired developers. This rule ensures that braces are on a separate line after the declaration to contrast the code block from the rest of the declaration. Comments between the declaration and the opening brace are respected. Check out the `opening_brace` rule for a different style.

violation.ruleDescription: The correct positioning of braces that introduce a block of code or member list is highly controversial. No matter which style is preferred, consistency is key. Apart from different tastes, the positioning of braces can also have a significant impact on the readability of the code, especially for visually impaired developers. This rule ensures that braces are on a separate line after the declaration to contrast the code block from the rest of the declaration. Comments between the declaration and the opening brace are respected. Check out the `opening_brace` rule for a different style.

Opening brace should be on a separate line
violation.ruleDescription: The correct positioning of braces that introduce a block of code or member list is highly controversial. No matter which style is preferred, consistency is key. Apart from different tastes, the positioning of braces can also have a significant impact on the readability of the code, especially for visually impaired developers. This rule ensures that braces are on a separate line after the declaration to contrast the code block from the rest of the declaration. Comments between the declaration and the opening brace are respected. Check out the `opening_brace` rule for a different style.

The correct positioning of braces that introduce a block of code or member list is highly controversial. No matter which style is preferred, consistency is key. Apart from different tastes, the positioning of braces can also have a significant impact on the readability of the code, especially for visually impaired developers. This rule ensures that braces are on a separate line after the declaration to contrast the code block from the rest of the declaration. Comments between the declaration and the opening brace are respected. Check out the `opening_brace` rule for a different style.

Apart from different tastes, the positioning of braces can also have a significant impact on the readability of the code, especially for visually impaired developers. This rule ensures that braces are on a separate line after the declaration to contrast the code block from the rest of the declaration. Comments between the declaration and the opening brace are respected. Check out the `opening_brace` rule for a different style.

Comments between the declaration and the opening brace are respected. Check out the `opening_brace` rule for a different style.

violation.ruleDescription: The correct positioning of braces that introduce a block of code or member list is highly controversial. No matter which style is preferred, consistency is key. Apart from different tastes, the positioning of braces can also have a significant impact on the readability of the code, especially for visually impaired developers. This rule ensures that braces are on a separate line after the declaration to contrast the code block from the rest of the declaration. Comments between the declaration and the opening brace are respected. Check out the `opening_brace` rule for a different style.

This rule ensures that braces are on a separate line after the declaration to contrast the code block from the rest of the declaration. Apart from different tastes, the positioning of braces can also have a significant impact on the readability of the code, especially for visually impaired developers. This rule ensures that braces are on a separate line after the declaration to contrast the code block from the rest of the declaration. Comments between the declaration and the opening brace are respected. Check out the `opening_brace` rule for a different style.
